overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a character walking along a dark dirt path at night, approaching and passing through a stone archway into a rural village. The footage features flashlight illumination typical of survival horror games, with stone architecture and empty rural surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural approach path to village gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the illuminated stone archway

entered.detail: large stone archway entrance with keystone, set in a perimeter wall
rough stone wall extending from the archway into the distance
tall grass and vegetation lining both sides of the dirt path
uneven dirt trail with visible tire tracks and stones

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a dark dirt path at night, approaching a stone archway entrance. The path is flanked by grass verges, and the stone perimeter walls extend on both sides toward the archway facade which dominates the center of the frame ahead.

events.description: entering the stone archway, transitioning from open field to enclosed tunnel

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark stone tunnel, passing wooden gates on the sides

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the archway tunnel interior, illuminated by flashlight
heavy wooden door or gate panel set into the tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the open exterior to the enclosed passage. The rough stone walls of the tunnel interior are visible on both sides, with a wooden gate door appearing on the left as the camera moves through the short passage.

events.description: exiting the archway into the village area with buildings on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path between village buildings, exploring the dark settlement

entered.detail: low stone building with dark roof, situated beside the path
stone wall and building facade on the right side of the path
simple wooden post fence running alongside the left building

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the archway, the scene opens into a narrow village path flanked by stone cottages. A wooden fence runs along the left side near the dirt path, while the stone buildings create a corridor-like effect as the camera proceeds deeper into the dark, empty settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, dark dirt path into the enclosed corridors of a silent rural village. It begins with a walk along a path flanked by grass verges, moving steadily toward a looming stone archway that dominates the center of the frame. As the camera passes through the archway, the environment shifts from the open night air to the confined space of a stone tunnel, where a wooden gate appears along the left wall. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the passage, transitioning into a narrow village lane lined with stone cottages and a wooden fence. This movement creates a corridor-like effect, drawing the viewer deeper into the dark, empty settlement.
